text_block_list.text:
One day, after Curren Chan has a number of
victories under her belt...

Luggage in hand, Curren Chan and I arrive at the
hot spring for the vacation we won in the raffle.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: We've made it to the inn!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
What a relaxing vibe! This is gonna be the perfect
vacation. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go check out the hot spring!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll let you handle it! I believe in youuu! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll let you handle it! I believe in youuu! ♪

Curren Chan seems even more cheerful than
usual. I guess she's been really looking forward to
this vacation.
So, without wasting any time...
Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whew! My skin's so much smoother now. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Am I even cuter now? Am I shining? Sparkling?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey! You're just agreeing with me, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Juuust kidding! I know you're always thinking of
me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Juuust kidding! I know you're always thinking of
me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I was actually thinking...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you'd be able to relax more if I wasn't
here.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you'd be able to relax more if I wasn't
here.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know I can be a bit self-centered. I do
things without asking, I drag you along and make
you do what I want...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know I can be a bit self-centered. I do
things without asking, I drag you along and make
you do what I want...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But you never try to stop me... I had a feeling you
would from the beginning, and that's why I chose
you to be my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But you never try to stop me... I had a feeling you
would from the beginning, and that's why I chose
you to be my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: No, I know. You really don't mind, do you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Even if what I wanna do isn't perfect, you
understand me... and you genuinely want to see
me realizing my dreams.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You want to be there with me. I never imagined
I'd find someone like you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And that's all the more reason I wanted you to be
able to take a break without me being there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... even knowing all that, I just can't bring
myself to keep my mouth shut and do that for
you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
After all, I know that's not how you want me to
be.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
After all, I know that's not how you want me to
be.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So... thanks. Thank you for always spoiling me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I was invincible back when I was on my own. But... you've given me a reason to stay invincible, as well as a reason to pursue cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And it's because I have that reason that my path
can shine brighter than before.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So I just want you to know that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I think you're cute too, Big Bro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I think you're cute too, Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Just keep thinking of me a whooole bunch more,
'kay? And...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Love me a whooole bunch more too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis!

I sense that Curren Chan and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
